4th PC Patterns

The bottom line for your 4th PC is that you'll have 4 leftover minos from your previous bag and 1 mino on hold. The hold mino can be any mino, but frequently, it will also be from your last bag.

These are some patterns that you can use for your 4th PC with the 5 minos that you'll have, under the assumption that they're all from your previous bag. Credit for the majority of patterns shown on this page goes to JimothyJimothy. Credits to other patterns are noted at the bottom of this page.

No.HoldCurrent Bag (Leftover)Next BagSubsequent Bag
1st

No IL

Hold J (99.42%)

There are different solutions depending on whether you held J or L. This PCO shape while holding J is reused for No IS / IZ and No JZ / LS .



Hold J (99.46%)

Chance is 99.42% if mirrored while holding L. This PCO shape while holding J (when mirrored, holding L) is reused for No IS / IZ and No JS / LZ .
